creator: freebsd@rootxs.org
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#       drupal5-securepages
#       drupal5-securepages/Makefile
#       drupal5-securepages/pkg-descr
#       drupal5-securepages/distinfo
#
echo c - drupal5-securepages
mkdir -p drupal5-securepages > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - drupal5-securepages/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >drupal5-securepages/Makefile << 'END-of-drupal5-securepages/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   drupal5-securepages
X# Date created:                                04 Januari 2008
X# Whom:                                        Dennis Cabooter <freebsd@rootxs.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=      securepages
XDISTVERSION=   5.x-1.6
XCATEGORIES=    www
XMASTER_SITES=  http://ftp.drupal.org/files/projects/
X
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
[root@eclipse /usr/ports/www]# shar `find drupal5-securepages`     
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#       drupal5-securepages
#       drupal5-securepages/Makefile
#       drupal5-securepages/pkg-descr
#       drupal5-securepages/distinfo
#
echo c - drupal5-securepages
mkdir -p drupal5-securepages > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - drupal5-securepages/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >drupal5-securepages/Makefile << 'END-of-drupal5-securepages/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   drupal5-securepages
X# Date created:                                04 Januari 2008
X# Whom:                                        Dennis Cabooter <freebsd@rootxs.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=      securepages
XDISTVERSION=   5.x-1.6
XCATEGORIES=    www
XMASTER_SITES=  http://ftp.drupal.org/files/projects/
X
XMAINTAINER=    freebsd@rootxs.org
XCOMMENT=       Set which pages are always going to be used in secure mode (SSL)
X
XDRUPAL5_MODULE=        yes
XMODULE_DIRS=   po
XMODULE_FILES=  securepages.install securepages.module securepages.info
X
XDOC_FILES=     LICENSE.txt
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X.include "${.CURDIR}/../../www/drupal5/bsd.drupal.mk"
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-drupal5-securepages/Makefile
echo x - drupal5-securepages/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >drupal5-securepages/pkg-descr << 'END-of-drupal5-securepages/pkg-descr'
XSet which pages are always going to be used in secure mode (SSL).
X
XWWW: http://drupal.org/project/securepages
END-of-drupal5-securepages/pkg-descr
echo x - drupal5-securepages/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >drupal5-securepages/distinfo << 'END-of-drupal5-securepages/distinfo'
XMD5 (drupal/securepages-5.x-1.6.tar.gz) = 0995b623910afc2378c06c6f537ce684
XSHA256 (drupal/securepages-5.x-1.6.tar.gz) = f4f29e60a0ea873fb7afe4887033741ff9ebefddbd7ac7fd06d61a4cc9631671
XSIZE (drupal/securepages-5.x-1.6.tar.gz) = 8925
END-of-drupal5-securepages/distinfo
exit
